## Analyzers (2)

### CheckPhish_Submit `v1.0`
Submit url address to CheckPhish

- **Author:** Peter Juhas
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `url`
- **Configuration:** [View config](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/CheckPhish/CheckPhish_Submit.json)

### CheckPhish `v1.0`
Check url address via CheckPhish using jobID returned from CheckPhish_Submit

- **Author:** Peter Juhas
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `string`
- **Configuration:** [View config](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/CheckPhish/CheckPhish.json)
